pr.title: Record: int5 GPTQ + Soft-Round QAT (3-seed mean 1.1162)

output.summary: Combines int5 GPTQ with soft-round QAT plus legal score-first AdamW TTT on a 33.6M 11-layer model for sub-16MB compression.
techniques: int5 GPTQ with Hessian-aware column reordering and Cholesky compensation
Soft-Round QAT via tanh-based rounding with α anneal replacing STE
Legal score-first AdamW TTT over 131k-token chunks with cosine LR across chunks
